mechanism: Credit cycle position determines whether a carry unwind progresses to Phase 4 (credit widening). Only 2/7 episodes with concurrent credit deterioration reached the full 4-phase sequence; others arrested at Phase 1-2 as contained positioning-driven events.
regime_dependence: Phase 4 only activates when credit cycle has already turned. At current IG ~110bp and HY ~380bp (below danger thresholds), base case is containment at Phase 1-2.
